name: TokenDto
description: A Data Transfer Object (DTO) used to encapsulate user token information, with the primary responsibility of generating and returning tokens after successful user authentication.
javaDoc:
create token and back to user

@author fdse

name: PriceConfig
description: PriceConfig is an entity class used to represent ticket price configuration information, typically used to store and manage configuration data related to train ticket prices.

name: GetOrderByIdInfo
description: This class is an entity class used to encapsulate request data for querying order information by order ID, used as a Data Transfer Object (DTO) in the system, mainly for carrying data related to order query operations.

name: RouteRepository
description: RouteRepository is an abstract data access interface responsible for managing persistence operations of Route entities, providing functions to query routes by ID, start/end stations, and delete specified routes. This class serves as the data access layer for routing information in the system, called by the business logic layer to access and manage route data.

name: EmailConfig
description: This class is a configuration class for configuring email-related settings, belonging to the infrastructure components of the system email function.

name: RebookController
description: RebookController is responsible for handling ticket rebooking-related requests, including rebooking operations and price difference payment, serving as the entry controller for rebooking business in the system.

name: RebookInfo
description: RebookInfo is an entity class used to represent ticket rebooking information, mainly carrying data related to rebooking in the system. This class is located in the edu.fudanselab.trainticket.entity package and interacts with other business logic components as a data model.

name: AuthUserRepository
description: AuthUserRepository is a persistence interface for managing AuthUser entities, providing query functions based on username (including single and multiple results) and the ability to delete users by user ID, belonging to the data access layer components.

name: NotificationServiceImpl
description: NotificationServiceImpl is the concrete implementation class of the notification service, responsible for handling various order-related notification operations, including notifications after order creation, modification, cancellation, and successful ticket reservation. This class sends notifications by calling external services and is the core component of the notification module in the system.

name: TokenServiceImpl
description: TokenServiceImpl is a service implementation class for handling user authentication tokens, with the primary responsibility of generating and returning authentication tokens based on basic authentication information provided by users. It is located in the service layer of the system and implements the TokenService interface related to user authentication.

name: SecurityController
description: SecurityController is a controller class for managing security configurations, providing RESTful interfaces for CRUD operations on security configurations and account security checks, located in the Web layer of the system security module, responsible for interacting with the frontend and calling backend services to handle security-related business.

name: TransferTravelInfo
description: An entity class representing transfer travel information, used to encapsulate data related to transfer travel, such as travel dates.

name: PreserveController
description: PreserveController is responsible for handling ticket reservation-related requests, providing interfaces for ticket reservation and homepage access, serving as the entry controller for the ticket reservation function.

name: Travel
description: Travel class is an entity class in the train ticket system, used to represent travel-related information.

name: CancelController
description: CancelController is a controller class for handling ticket cancellation-related requests, providing functions to calculate refund fees and execute refund operations, while also supporting homepage access. It is located in the Web layer of the system, responsible for interacting with clients and coordinating related business logic.

name: VerifyCodeService
description: VerifyCodeService is an abstract service class responsible for generating and verifying verification codes. It provides abstract methods for generating image verification codes and verifying user-input verification codes, used to implement verification code functionality in Web applications, typically interacting with HTTP requests/responses and supporting custom header information.

name: WaitListOrderVO
description: WaitListOrderVO is a Value Object (VO) used to represent waitlist order information, mainly containing date information related to waitlist orders, accessed and set through getDate() and setDate() methods, used for data transmission and encapsulation in the system.

name: InsidePaymentServiceImpl
description: InsidePaymentServiceImpl is an implementation class for internal payment services, responsible for handling business logic related to user accounts and payments, including payments, account creation, recharges, querying account and payment information, refunds, and payment difference processing. This class serves as the core service of the payment module in the system, working collaboratively with order status management and other functions.

name: SecurityConfig
description: SecurityConfig is an entity class for security configurations, possibly used to store or manage configuration information related to system security.

name: BasicAuthDto
description: A Data Transfer Object (DTO) used to encapsulate user login information, mainly used to transmit basic authentication credentials such as username and password during the user authentication process.

name: TripResponse
description: TripResponse is an entity class used to encapsulate trip-related information in the train ticket system, mainly serving as a Data Transfer Object (DTO) for passing trip query results between services.

name: ServiceResolver
description: ServiceResolver is an abstract class used to resolve service names to corresponding service URLs, with the primary responsibility of providing service discovery functionality. Its subclasses need to implement specific URL resolution logic.

name: DeliveryRepository
description: DeliveryRepository is a data access interface responsible for managing persistence operations of Delivery entities, providing functions to query by ID or order ID, delete, and retrieve all delivery records, serving as the bridge between the delivery module and data storage in the system.

name: AdminUserServiceImpl
description: AdminUserServiceImpl is a service implementation class for managing user information, responsible for providing CRUD functions for user data, including getting all users, deleting specified users, updating user information, and adding new users. This class is located in the service implementation layer of the system, providing backend user management support for administrator users.

name: OrderController
description: OrderController is a controller class responsible for handling train ticket order-related business, providing RESTful interfaces for order creation, query, modification, deletion, payment, and security verification, serving as the entry point for the system order module to interact with external systems.

name: AuthController
description: AuthController is responsible for handling user authentication-related requests, including creating default users and providing basic health check interfaces (such as returning greeting messages). This class is located in the control layer of the system, receiving and processing authentication-related HTTP requests from clients, coordinating calls to the service layer to complete business logic, and returning corresponding response results.

name: OrderInitData
description: OrderInitData class is used to initialize order-related data at system startup, supporting command line parameter-triggered initialization logic through implementing the run method, belonging to the system initialization module.

name: PlainAssurance
description: An entity class representing train ticket insurance information, used to store and manage insurance-related data.

name: TravelService2Impl
description: TravelService2Impl is a travel service implementation class responsible for handling query, create, update, and delete operations related to train tickets. It provides functions to get routes and train types by trip ID, batch query ticket information, manage trip details, and includes multiple auxiliary methods for internal logic processing, such as getting remaining ticket counts and setting response data. This class serves as the core processing unit for travel information business logic in the system, interacting with entity classes (such as TravelInfo, TripInfo) and other services to complete complete ticketing operations.

name: Mail
description: An entity class representing email information, used to encapsulate email-related data.

name: ItemNameUtil
description: ItemNameUtil is a utility class providing string formatting methods for simplifying and converting item names, such as converting names to lowercase hyphen format or shortening names.

name: PriceInitData
description: PriceInitData is an initialization class for initializing price data, executing price-related data initialization logic at system startup through implementing the run method.

name: BasicController
description: BasicController is a controller class for handling basic travel-related query requests, responsible for providing interfaces for homepage access, single or batch trip queries, and station ID queries, located in the system Web layer, interacting with clients through HTTP requests.

name: User
description: User class is the user entity class in the system, used to represent and manage basic user information, typically serving as a data model passed between the persistence layer and business logic layer.

name: RebookService
description: RebookService is an abstract service class responsible for handling ticket rebooking-related business, including executing rebooking operations and paying the price difference generated by rebooking. This class defines the core interface for the rebooking process and requires concrete implementation classes to complete the actual logic.

name: FoodOrderRepository
description: FoodOrderRepository is a data access interface responsible for persistence operations on FoodOrder entities, including querying by ID or order number, deleting, and retrieving all food orders. This class serves as a repository layer component in the system, providing upper-level business logic with access to food order data.

name: AdminOrderServiceImpl
description: AdminOrderServiceImpl is an administrator order service implementation class responsible for handling management operations related to train ticket orders, including querying all orders, deleting orders, updating orders, and adding orders. This class serves as the service layer implementation of the order management module in the system, providing administrators with complete control over order data.

name: OrderStatus
description: OrderStatus is an enum class used to represent order status, providing mapping and query functions between status codes and status names.

name: RouteInfoCommon
description: RouteInfoCommon class is used to encapsulate common route information, mainly including a list of passing stations and distance lists between adjacent stations. This class serves as a Data Transfer Object (DTO) in the system for passing basic route-related data between different modules.

name: TrainServiceImpl
description: TrainServiceImpl is the implementation class of the TrainService interface, responsible for providing complete CRUD operations for TrainType, including create, query (by ID, name, or name list), update, and delete, while also supporting general queries. This class serves as the core business logic processing unit for train type data in the system, interacting with the data access layer and upper-level services, with all methods carrying HttpHeaders to support request context passing.

name: ContactsRepository
description: ContactsRepository is an abstract data access interface responsible for managing persistence operations of Contacts entities. It provides query methods based on conditions such as account ID, document number, and document type, as well as delete and full query functions, serving as the core component of the contact data access layer in the system.

name: Account
description: An entity class representing user account information, used to store and manage account-related data in the train ticket system.

name: PaymentInfo
description: PaymentInfo is an entity class used to represent payment information related to train ticket payments, mainly used for data persistence and transmission in the system.

name: CancelServiceImpl
description: CancelServiceImpl is a core service class responsible for handling order cancellation business, with main responsibilities including canceling orders, calculating refund amounts, executing refund operations, and sending notification emails. This class interacts with order services and other external services to complete cross-service order cancellation processes, and provides user account information retrieval and fund rollback functions, playing the role of order cancellation and refund coordinator in the system.

name: JWTFilter
description: JWTFilter is a filter for handling JWT (JSON Web Token) authentication, responsible for verifying and parsing JWT tokens in the request processing chain to ensure request security.

name: FoodDeliveryInitData
description: An initialization class responsible for initializing food delivery-related data, executing initialization logic through the run method.

name: ConfigService
description: ConfigService is an abstract service class responsible for managing configuration information in the system, providing core operations for configuration creation, update, query (single and all), and deletion. This class serves as the service layer interface for the configuration management module, defining standard CRUD methods for concrete implementation classes to inherit and implement.

name: PreserveOtherServiceImpl
description: PreserveOtherServiceImpl is a service implementation class for handling train ticket reservation-related business logic, with main responsibilities including order creation, seat allocation, insurance addition, contact information retrieval, catering and consignment service creation, security verification, and notification email sending. This class collaborates with other internal services (such as user services, trip detail services, station queries, etc.) to complete the complete ticket reservation process, playing the role of core business coordinator in the system.

name: WaitListOrderServiceImpl
description: WaitListOrderServiceImpl is the implementation class for waitlist order services, responsible for managing core business logic such as creation, query, update, and status modification of waitlist orders, and processing subsequent waitlist order processes by triggering threads. This class serves as the service layer component of the waitlist order module in the system, interacting with order data models and external interfaces.

name: UserInitUser
description: UserInitUser is an initialization class for initializing user data, executing user-related initialization logic at system startup through implementing the run method.

name: PaymentServiceImpl
description: PaymentServiceImpl is the core implementation class for payment services, responsible for handling payment-related business logic, including payment, recharge, account information query, and payment initialization operations. This class is located in the service implementation layer, providing specific payment function support for upper-level calls.

name: RouteService
description: RouteService is an abstract service class responsible for managing core business logic related to Routes, including querying routes by start/end points, getting all routes, querying single or multiple routes by ID, creating/updating routes, and deleting routes. This class provides a unified interface for route data operations, typically completed by concrete implementation classes for actual data access and processing, and is a key component of the route management module in the system.

name: ConsignRepository
description: ConsignRepository is an abstract data access interface for managing ConsignRecords, providing functions to query consignment records based on conditions such as account ID, order ID, and consignee. This class serves as a repository layer component in the system, responsible for interacting with data storage and providing data support for upper-level business logic.

name: SeatController
description: SeatController is a controller class for handling seat-related business requests, with main responsibilities including creating seat information and querying remaining tickets for intervals. It is located in the control layer of the system, receiving HTTP requests and coordinating corresponding service logic, interacting with other components through RESTful interfaces.

name: TrainTicketInitData
description: An initialization class responsible for initializing train ticket system-related data, executing initialization logic through the run method.

name: AssuranceServiceImpl
description: AssuranceServiceImpl is a class providing insurance service implementation, responsible for handling insurance-related CRUD operations, including querying insurance by ID or order ID, creating and modifying insurance, deleting insurance, and getting all insurance and insurance type information. This class serves as the core implementation of insurance business logic in the system, closely associated with order services.

name: TravelPlanService
description: TravelPlanService is an abstract service class responsible for providing travel planning-related functions, including querying transfer plans, and getting the cheapest, fastest, and fewest-station trip plans. This class defines the core interface for travel planning, for concrete implementation classes to extend, collaborating with data model classes such as TripInfo and TransferTravelInfo to provide unified trip query services for upper-level callers.

name: Contacts
description: Contacts class is used to represent user contact information, overriding equals and hashCode methods to support object comparison and hash operations, typically used in the system to manage contact data related to ticket purchasing.

name: AdminBasicInfoServiceImpl
description: AdminBasicInfoServiceImpl is a business implementation class for managing backend basic information, responsible for providing CRUD operations on core data such as contacts, stations, trains, system configurations, and prices. This class serves as the concrete implementation of the AdminBasicInfoService interface, providing administrators with unified data management interfaces, and undertaking core responsibilities for basic data maintenance in the system.

name: RouteServiceImpl
description: RouteServiceImpl is the core service implementation class for route management, responsible for providing business functions such as route creation, modification, deletion, and query (including by ID, start/end points, batch IDs, and full query), and is the main service component for handling route-related operations in the system.

name: Payment
description: Payment entity class, used to represent payment information in the train ticket system.

name: TrainFoodServiceImpl
description: TrainFoodServiceImpl is an implementation class responsible for handling train catering-related business logic, including creating train catering information, listing all train catering, and querying corresponding train catering information by trip ID. This class serves as a service layer component in the system, providing interfaces for interacting with train catering data.

name: Station
description: Station class is used to represent train station entities, with the main responsibility of encapsulating station-related information, such as station names, and providing access and modification methods for corresponding attributes.

name: NotifyInfo
description: A general notification information entity class, used to encapsulate notification-related data, used as a Data Transfer Object (DTO) or persistence entity in the system.

name: TravelPlanController
description: TravelPlanController is a controller class responsible for handling HTTP requests related to travel planning, including getting transfer plans, and querying trip information by lowest price, shortest time, and fewest stations. This class serves as the interface between the frontend and travel planning services in the system, coordinating calls to different query strategies.

name: ConfigRepository
description: ConfigRepository is an abstract data access interface responsible for persistence operations on configuration items (Config), including querying by name, querying all configurations, and deleting configurations by name. This class is located in the data access layer, providing a unified configuration data management interface for upper-level business logic.

name: ConsignService
description: ConsignService is an abstract service class responsible for handling operations related to consignment records, including insertion, update, and various ways of querying consignment records (such as by account ID, order ID, or consignee name). This class serves as the interface definition for consignment business logic in the system, for concrete implementation classes to inherit and provide actual functionality.

name: TripRepository
description: TripRepository is an abstract data access interface responsible for persistence operations on Trip entities, including querying trips by TripId or RouteId, deleting specified trips, and getting all trips. This class provides a unified interface for trip data access, typically inherited and implemented by concrete persistence implementation classes (such as database-based Repositories).

name: StationService
description: StationService is an abstract service class responsible for CRUD operations and various query functions for station information, including querying stations by name, ID, and batch methods. This class serves as a unified interface for station data access in the system, for upper-level business calls, and interacts with Station entities and HTTP request headers.

name: PaymentDifferenceInfo
description: An entity class representing payment difference information, used to encapsulate data related to payment amount differences.

name: Order
description: Order class is used to represent train ticket order entities, with the main responsibility of encapsulating order-related data, and providing object equality judgment and hash code calculation to support collection operations.

name: TrainTypeRepository
description: TrainTypeRepository is an abstract data access interface for managing persistence operations of TrainType entities, providing functions to query train types by ID, name, or name list, as well as delete and get all train types. This class serves as the data access layer in the system, closely associated with TrainType entities, typically called by the service layer to complete access operations on train type data.

name: WaitListOrderController
description: WaitListOrderController is a controller class for handling waitlist order-related requests, providing functions such as creating waitlist orders, getting all orders, and getting waitlist order lists, located in the Web layer of the system, responsible for interacting with the frontend.

name: Seat
description: Seat class is an entity class used to represent seat information in the train ticket system, belonging to the domain model.

name: Ticket
description: An entity class representing train ticket information, used to encapsulate ticket-related data.

name: TravelAdvanceResultUnit
description: A general entity class used to encapsulate relevant data for travel pre-purchase results, with specific responsibilities to be further clarified based on its attributes or context.

name: PriceServiceImpl
description: PriceServiceImpl is the service implementation class for price configuration management, responsible for providing CRUD functions for price configurations, including querying price configurations by route ID and train type, batch querying, creating, updating, and deleting price configurations.

name: RabbitReceive
description: RabbitReceive class is responsible for handling messages received from RabbitMQ, with its core method process used to parse and execute business logic represented by message payloads, serving as a message consumer in the system.

name: NotificationController
description: NotificationController is responsible for handling HTTP requests related to notifications, including notification logic for scenarios such as successful order creation, modification, cancellation, and successful ticket reservation, while also providing endpoints for test email sending and homepage access. This class serves as the entry point for notification services, receiving NotifyInfo data and triggering corresponding notification operations.

name: LeftTicketInfo
description: LeftTicketInfo class is used to encapsulate remaining ticket information, an entity class in the ticket query system, with the main responsibility of storing and representing remaining ticket data for specific trains.

name: ServiceResolverImpl
description: ServiceResolverImpl is a service resolution implementation class, responsible for obtaining corresponding service URL addresses based on service names, used for service-to-service communication positioning.

name: TrainType
description: An entity class representing train types, used to encapsulate train type-related information, used as a data model in the system.

name: RoutePlanInfo
description: RoutePlanInfo class is used to encapsulate basic route planning information, mainly containing the names of starting and ending stations, providing data support for route queries in the ticket reservation system.

name: AddMoneyRepository
description: This class is a data access layer component used to handle data operations related to 'AddMoney' (recharge), but no specific methods are currently defined.

name: AdminBasicInfoService
description: AdminBasicInfoService is an abstract service class responsible for providing administrators with CRUD operations on basic data in the railway booking system, including information such as contacts, stations, trains, configurations, and prices. This class defines a series of abstract methods, with concrete implementation classes completing actual business logic, and is the core interface of the system management function module.

name: Trip
description: Trip class is used to represent trip entities in the train ticket system, encapsulating data attributes related to trips, and is a basic entity class for data transmission and persistence in the system.

name: StationFoodStore
description: StationFoodStore is an entity class used to represent catering store information within train stations, mainly used for data persistence and related information transmission in business logic in the system.

name: VerifyCodeController
description: VerifyCodeController is responsible for handling verification code-related requests, including generating image verification codes and verifying verification codes submitted by users. This controller provides verification code services in the system to enhance security, collaborating with other controllers to complete user identity verification processes.

name: PaymentService
description: PaymentService is an abstract service class responsible for handling payment-related business logic, including payment, recharge, account information query, and payment initialization operations. This class defines the core interface for the payment module, for concrete implementation classes to extend, and is the unified entry point for payment functions in the system.

name: InsidePaymentService
description: InsidePaymentService is an abstract service class responsible for handling internal payment-related business logic, including payment, account creation, recharge, refund, query, and other operations. This class defines the core interface for payment services, for concrete implementation classes to inherit and implement, and is a key component for interaction between the payment module and other parts of the system.

name: FoodDeliveryOrderRepository
description: FoodDeliveryOrderRepository is a data access interface responsible for providing query functions for food delivery orders, including finding orders by station food store ID and getting all orders. This class serves as a repository layer component in the system, associated with FoodDeliveryOrder entities, providing data support for upper-level business logic.

name: ConsignPriceServiceImpl
description: ConsignPriceServiceImpl is an implementation class responsible for handling consignment price-related business logic, including getting prices by weight and region, querying price information, creating and modifying price configurations, and getting current price configurations. This class serves as the core implementation of consignment price services in the system, closely related to price configuration management and client request processing.

name: WaitListOrder
description: WaitListOrder class is used to represent waitlist order entities, containing key information such as creation time, travel time, and waitlist deadline, mainly managing users' waitlist ticket purchase requests in the ticketing system.

name: ExecuteServiceImpl
description: ExecuteServiceImpl is an implementation class for order execution services, mainly responsible for handling execution and collection operations of ticket orders. It interacts with order services by calling internal methods, updates order status based on order IDs, and supports getting order information from different order service endpoints. This class undertakes core responsibilities related to order execution in the business logic layer in the system.

name: PreserveServiceImpl
description: PreserveServiceImpl is the core implementation class for train ticket reservation services, responsible for handling the complete ticket reservation process, including seat allocation, order creation, insurance addition, catering and consignment service ordering, security verification, contact information retrieval, user account query, and email notification. This class serves as a service layer component, coordinating multiple internal methods and interacting with external services to complete complex reservation business logic.

name: ConsignPriceInitData
description: ConsignPriceInitData is an initialization class for initializing consignment price data, executing related data initialization logic at system startup through implementing the run method.

name: Assurance
description: A general entity class used to represent insurance (Assurance) related information, possibly used as a data model in the system.

name: OrderTicketsInfo
description: OrderTicketsInfo class is used to encapsulate start and end station information for ticket orders, providing methods to get departure and destination locations, serving as a data transfer object for order-related data in the system.

name: OrderRepository
description: OrderRepository is an abstract data access interface responsible for providing persistence operations on Order entities, including querying by ID, querying all orders, querying by account ID, querying by travel date and train number, and deleting orders. This class serves as the core component of the order data access layer in the system, called by upper-level business logic, not directly implementing specific logic, and needs to be implemented by concrete subclasses.

name: SecurityServiceImpl
description: SecurityServiceImpl is the core service implementation class for security configuration management, responsible for providing CRUD functions for security configurations, and supporting security checks on user accounts. This class interacts with order services to get security-related order information, to complete security verification logic, playing a key role in connecting security configuration data with business orders in the system.

name: ConsignServiceImpl
description: ConsignServiceImpl class is responsible for implementing the core business logic of consignment services, including insertion and update of consignment records, and query functions based on account ID, order ID, or consignee information. This class serves as the implementation layer of consignment services in the system, handling data operation requests related to consignment, and interacting with other services or data access layers.

name: FoodController
description: FoodController is a controller class for managing food orders, providing RESTful interfaces for creating, querying, updating, and deleting food orders, and supporting batch operations and delivery testing. This class is located in the train-ticket system, responsible for handling HTTP requests related to food, and communicating with the frontend or other services through HttpHeaders for authentication or information transmission.

name: RouteInitData
description: RouteInitData is an initialization class for initializing route data, executing related data initialization logic at system startup through the run method.

name: TrainTicketApplication
description: TrainTicketApplication is the main startup class for the Spring Boot application, responsible for initializing and running the train ticket reservation system. It contains the main method as the program entry point, and configures RestTemplate instances through the restTemplate method, used to support HTTP communication within the system or with other services.

name: PriceInfo
description: PriceInfo is an entity class used to represent price information, mainly carrying price-related data in the train-ticket system. This class is located in the edu.fudanselab.trainticket.entity package, used as a data model to encapsulate price-related information, and may be used by other services or data access layers.

name: AssuranceTypeBean
description: An entity class representing insurance types, used to encapsulate insurance type-related information.

name: StationFoodService
description: StationFoodService is an abstract service class responsible for managing business logic related to station food stores, including creating food stores, querying food store lists by station name or ID, and other operations. This class provides a unified interface for station food store data access, typically completed by concrete implementation classes for actual data processing and persistence operations.

name: AdminTravelServiceImpl
description: AdminTravelServiceImpl is an administrator travel service implementation class, responsible for providing full lifecycle management functions for travel information, including querying, adding, modifying, and deleting travel information, as well as verifying travel information and station validity. This class also supports querying train types by name, and internally encapsulates auxiliary methods for getting route information by route ID. It serves as a backend service layer component in the system, working collaboratively with other services such as routing and train types.

name: AssuranceType
description: AssuranceType is an entity class representing assurance types, used to encapsulate information related to assurance types, including index, name, and price, and provides static methods to obtain corresponding assurance type instances by index. This class serves as the data model for assurance types in the system, supporting the storage and querying of assurance information.

name: CookieUtil
description: CookieUtil is a utility class for handling HTTP Cookies, providing functions such as adding cookies to responses and retrieving cookies by name from requests, assisting in cookie management in Web applications.

name: ConsignInitData
description: The ConsignInitData class is responsible for initializing consignment-related data when the system starts, executing initialization logic through the run method, and is an auxiliary component in the system data preparation phase.

name: BasicService
description: BasicService is an abstract service class that defines basic interfaces related to travel information queries, including querying single or multiple trip information and querying station IDs by station name, providing a unified query abstraction for upper-level services.

name: RouteController
description: RouteController is a controller class for managing train route information, providing RESTful interfaces for creating, modifying, deleting, querying single or multiple routes, and querying routes by origin and destination, serving as the core entry point for the route management module in the system.

name: JWTUtil
description: JWTUtil is a utility class for handling JWT (JSON Web Token) authentication, primarily responsible for extracting and validating JWTs from HTTP requests, parsing user identity and role information, and providing JWT-based security authentication support for the system.

name: CancelService
description: CancelService is an abstract service class responsible for handling the core logic of order cancellation and refund calculation. It defines two abstract methods: cancelOrder for canceling specified orders, and calculateRefund for calculating the refund amount of orders. This class serves as a unified interface for order cancellation-related business in the system, for concrete implementation classes to extend, and works closely with the order management module.

name: FoodInitData
description: FoodInitData is a utility class for initializing food data, with its main responsibility being to generate food lists by parsing input strings and complete the initialization of related data when the system starts. This class implements the command line runner interface, typically as part of the system initialization process, and is closely associated with the food data model Food.

name: TripOrderInfo
description: TripOrderInfo is an entity class used to represent information related to train ticket orders, primarily responsible for data storage and transmission in the system, usually mapped to database tables and used by other business logic classes.

name: AuthDto
description: AuthDto is a Data Transfer Object (DTO) used to transmit user authentication-related information from user-service to auth-service after user registration.
javaDoc:
user-service register user , then send to auth-service

@author fdse

name: AssuranceService
description: AssuranceService is an abstract service class responsible for handling business logic related to assurances, including creation, querying, modification, and deletion of assurances. It serves as the core service interface for the assurance management module in the system, defining standard methods for operating on assurance records and assurance types, and supports request context passing through HttpHeaders. This class is closely associated with the order module, performing assurance-related queries and management through order IDs.

name: StationServiceImpl
description: StationServiceImpl is the implementation class for station information service, responsible for providing CRUD functions for station information, including single and batch querying of station information (by name or ID), creating, updating, and deleting stations, and supporting verification of whether a station exists. This class serves as the core service for station data management in the system, closely associated with the Station entity class, and handles request header information through HttpHeaders.

name: TextMapUtil
description: TextMapUtil is a utility class that provides static methods for converting Iterable<Map.Entry<String, String>> to Map<String, String>, used to simplify the conversion operations of key-value pair collections.

name: TrainFoodRepository
description: TrainFoodRepository is a data access interface responsible for managing persistent operations on TrainFood entities, providing functions to query by ID, trip ID, delete, and retrieve all TrainFood records, located in the system data access layer, usually inherited by concrete data storage implementation classes.

name: ConfigServiceImpl
description: ConfigServiceImpl is the implementation class for configuration management service, responsible for providing CRUD functions for configuration information, including creating, updating, querying single configurations, deleting configurations, and querying all configurations.

name: ExceptionUtils
description: ExceptionUtils is a utility class for exception handling and debugging, providing functions for logging warning information, retrieving recent exceptions, setting failure status, and extracting exception messages, mainly used to assist in error diagnosis and logging in the system.

name: TravelResult
description: The TravelResult class is used to encapsulate the result information of travel queries, with its main responsibility being to represent status data related to travel, providing access to status through the isStatus() method. This class is located in the entity layer of the ticket system and is used as a data transfer object.

name: Food
description: An entity class representing food information in the train ticket system, used to encapsulate data related to food.

name: Travel2Controller
description: Travel2Controller is a controller class for handling train trip-related business, responsible for providing RESTful interfaces for trip information CRUD, trip detail queries, route and train type retrieval, while distinguishing query permissions between regular users and administrators.

name: RebookServiceImpl
description: RebookServiceImpl is a service class that implements rebooking business logic, responsible for handling core functions such as ticket rebooking, fare difference payment, order updates and creation, seat allocation, and interacting with related services such as trips, routes, and orders.

name: UserServiceImpl
description: UserServiceImpl is the core implementation class for user services, responsible for handling user-related business logic, including user CRUD operations, default authentication user creation, and deletion of user authentication information. This class serves as the service layer of the user management module in the system, interacting with the data access layer and authentication module, providing a unified user operation interface for upper layers.

name: GetPriceDomain
description: A general entity class representing data related to price queries, used to encapsulate domain information related to price retrieval.

name: Balance
description: An entity class representing user account balance, used to store and manage user balance information in the train ticket system.

name: Gender
description: The Gender class is used to represent gender information, providing mapping and query functions between gender codes and names, supporting the retrieval of corresponding gender names through codes.

name: WaitListOrderStatus
description: WaitListOrderStatus is an enumeration helper class used to represent and manage the mapping of codes and names for waitlist order statuses. It provides methods to obtain status codes, status names, and the function to query corresponding names through status codes, playing a role in unified management and parsing of waitlist order statuses in the system.

name: TripId
description: TripId is an entity class used to identify trips, mainly providing a string representation of the trip ID, typically used for unique identification and display of trips in the system.

name: TrainInitData
description: A startup class responsible for initializing train-related basic data in the train ticket system, loading or setting necessary initial data when the application starts through the run method.

name: RoutePlanServiceImpl
description: RoutePlanServiceImpl is a class that implements route planning services, responsible for searching for optimal travel plans based on different strategies (such as cheapest, quickest, minimum stops). It obtains trip information by calling high-speed and regular train services, and supports querying detailed information by route ID or trip ID, serving as the core processing component for route planning logic in the system.

name: OrderOtherServiceImpl
description: OrderOtherServiceImpl is the core implementation class for order services, responsible for handling full lifecycle operations related to train ticket orders, including creation, querying, modification, cancellation, payment, and security verification functions. This class serves as the main bearer of order business logic in the system, providing complete order management service interfaces for upper layers by interacting with data models such as Seat, Order, and HttpHeaders.

name: TrainService
description: TrainService is an abstract service class responsible for managing the full lifecycle operations of TrainType objects, including creation, querying (by ID, name, or all), updating, and deletion. This class serves as a unified interface for train type data access in the system, for upper-level business logic to call, and supports request context passing (such as authentication information) through HttpHeaders. Its concrete implementation is provided by subclasses and is closely associated with the TrainType entity.

name: AllTripFood
description: AllTripFood is an entity class used to represent all dining information related to trips, and may be used as a data transfer or persistent object in the system.

name: CommonOrderAlterInfo
description: A general order modification information entity class used to encapsulate basic data related to train ticket order changes.

name: ExecuteControlller
description: ExecuteController is responsible for handling ticket execution-related operations, including executing ticket issuance and ticket collection requests, while providing a homepage entry. This controller is located in the service interface layer of the system, receiving client requests through RESTful API and interacting with order services to complete corresponding business logic.

name: Consign
description: The Consign class is an entity class used to represent consignment-related information, and may be used in the system to encapsulate data related to consignment business.

name: InsertConsignRecordResult
description: An entity class representing the result of inserting a consignment record operation, used to encapsulate the return information after inserting a consignment record.

name: ConsignPriceController
description: ConsignPriceController is a controller class responsible for handling consignment price-related requests, providing functions such as obtaining price information, querying prices by weight and region, retrieving and modifying price configurations, located in the Web layer of the system, used to interface with front-end requests and call corresponding service logic.

name: Travel2InitData
description: Travel2InitData is a startup class for initializing travel-related data, executing initialization logic through the run method, typically loading necessary travel module data when the system starts.

name: NotificationService
description: NotificationService is an abstract service class responsible for defining notification logic related to order status changes, including notification handling for scenarios such as successful booking, successful order creation, successful order modification, and successful order cancellation. This class provides a unified abstract interface for notification functions, with concrete implementation classes completing the actual notification sending logic.

name: ConfigController
description: ConfigController is a controller class for managing configuration information, providing RESTful interfaces for querying, creating, updating, deleting, and retrieving configurations, located in the control layer of the train-ticket system, responsible for configuration data interaction with the front-end or other services.

name: InsidePaymentController
description: InsidePaymentController is responsible for handling internal payment-related operations, including payment, account creation, recharge, querying payment information, querying account information, withdrawal, and paying differences. This class serves as the controller for payment services, receiving and processing payment-related requests from clients, and interacting with payment and account services.

name: TravelInfo
description: TravelInfo is an entity class used to represent trip information related to train tickets, primarily serving as a data model in the system.

name: PriceController
description: PriceController is a controller class for managing price configurations, providing RESTful interfaces for querying, creating, updating, and deleting price information, supporting various query methods such as by route and train type, batch queries, and full queries, responsible for handling HTTP requests related to prices in the system.

name: AdminUserController
description: AdminUserController is a controller class for managing user information, providing RESTful interfaces for administrators to perform CRUD operations on users, located in the server-side control layer of the system, working in coordination with data transfer objects such as UserDto.

name: TravelPlanServiceImpl
description: TravelPlanServiceImpl is a class that implements travel planning services, primarily responsible for providing users with train trip plans based on different strategies (such as cheapest, quickest, minimum stops, etc.), including direct and transfer plans. It processes high-speed and regular route queries by calling internal private methods, and supports obtaining remaining ticket quantities and train type information, located in the service layer of the system, providing business logic support for trip planning to upper layers.

name: RoutePlanService
description: RoutePlanService is an abstract service class responsible for providing interfaces for various route planning strategies, including querying for the cheapest, fastest, and least stops trip plans. This class defines three abstract methods, with subclasses implementing specific route planning logic, serving as the core service layer for route planning functionality in the system.

name: MicroserviceInitData
description: The MicroserviceInitData class is responsible for executing initialization data logic when microservices start, processing startup parameters and completing related initialization tasks through the run method.

name: TravelController
description: TravelController is a controller class for managing train trip-related operations, providing RESTful interfaces including trip creation, querying, updating, deletion, and retrieving detailed trip information. This class serves as the entry point for travel services in the system, handling HTTP requests from clients and interacting with backend services to complete corresponding business logic.

name: JsonUtils
description: JsonUtils is a utility class that provides mutual conversion between objects, JSON, and Maps, supporting object serialization to JSON strings, JSON deserialization to specified type objects, object to Map conversion, JSON string to Map conversion, and conversion between object types. This class is used in the system to simplify data format conversion operations, typically called by other business components to handle JSON data.

name: ConsignRecord
description: ConsignRecord is an entity class used to represent information related to consignment records, used as a data model in the system.

name: InsidePaymentMoney
description: InsidePaymentMoney is an entity class used to represent information related to internal payment amounts, and is part of the data model in the train-ticket system.

name: StationFoodRepository
description: StationFoodRepository is a repository interface for managing station dining information, providing query-based on station name or ID, full retrieval, and deletion operations, supporting persistent access to station dining data.

name: InsidePaymentRepository
description: InsidePaymentRepository is a persistence interface for managing internal payment records, providing functions to query payment records by ID, order ID, and user ID, as well as the ability to query all payment records. It serves as a data access layer component in the system, closely associated with the InsidePayment entity, supporting the access needs of upper-level business logic to payment data.

name: UserService
description: UserService is an abstract service class responsible for managing user-related business logic, including user CRUD operations. This class defines core methods such as saving users, querying all users, querying by username or user ID, updating, and deleting users, providing a unified user data access interface for upper-level calls.

name: WaitListOrderService
description: WaitListOrderService is an abstract service class responsible for the full lifecycle management of waitlist orders, including creation, querying, updating, and status modification operations. This class defines core business interfaces related to waitlist orders, serving as a unified entry point for waitlist order business logic in the system, working closely with order data models (such as WaitListOrder and WaitListOrderVO).

name: AdminOrderService
description: AdminOrderService is an abstract service class responsible for managing the full lifecycle operations of train ticket orders, including querying all orders, deleting specified orders, updating order information, and adding new orders. This class provides order management functions for administrators, located in the service layer of the system, handling request authentication and context through HttpHeaders, and interacting with data models such as Order.

name: OutsidePaymentInfo
description: An entity class representing external payment information, used to encapsulate data required for interacting with external payment systems.

name: AdminRouteService
description: AdminRouteService is an abstract service class responsible for managing train route-related administrator operations, including retrieving all routes, creating and modifying routes, and deleting specified routes. This class defines the core interface for route management, with actual business logic to be completed by concrete implementation classes.

name: NotifyRepository
description: NotifyRepository is a data access interface responsible for persistent operations on notification information (NotifyInfo), providing basic data access methods such as querying by ID, querying all, and deleting by ID.

name: GetAccountByIdInfo
description: This class is an entity class used to encapsulate requests for retrieving account information by ID, primarily used as a Data Transfer Object (DTO) in the system, and does not contain business logic methods.

name: StationFoodStoreInfo
description: An entity class representing food store information within stations, used to store and manage data related to station food stores.

name: TravelInitData
description: The TravelInitData class is responsible for initializing travel-related data when the system starts, executing initialization logic through the run method, typically used to load or set initial data required for travel services.

name: TokenService
description: TokenService is an abstract service class responsible for handling authentication requests related to tokens, receiving authentication information through the getToken method and returning corresponding responses, providing a unified token acquisition interface for the system.

name: ConfigInitData
description: The ConfigInitData class is responsible for executing configuration initialization operations when the system starts, completing related initialization logic through the run method, and is part of the system initialization module.

name: OtherInitData
description: Responsible for loading and initializing other auxiliary data during system initialization, typically performing one-time initialization tasks when the application starts.

name: SoldTicket
description: An entity class representing sold tickets, used to store and manage information related to ticket sales.

name: InsidePaymentAddMoneyRepository
description: InsidePaymentAddMoneyRepository is a data access interface responsible for providing query operations on user recharge records (InsidePaymentMoney), including finding recharge records by user ID and retrieving all recharge records. This class is located in the repository layer, used to interact with data storage, and supports recharge-related functions in the payment module.

name: Money
description: An entity class representing monetary amounts, used to encapsulate currency-related data in the train ticket system.

name: AuthUserService
description: AuthUserService is an abstract service class responsible for managing core operations related to user authentication, including saving users, retrieving all user lists, creating default authentication users, and deleting specified users. This class serves as the service layer interface for the user authentication module in the system, providing unified user management functions for upper layers, and interacting with components such as DTOs and HTTP request headers.

name: AdminUserService
description: AdminUserService is an abstract service class responsible for managing user-related backend operations, including retrieving all users, deleting users, updating users, and adding users. This class defines the core interface for user management, for use by administrators, with actual logic to be completed by concrete implementation classes.

name: RoutePlanController
description: RoutePlanController is responsible for handling HTTP requests related to route planning, providing functions to obtain the cheapest, fastest, and least stops routes, serving as the entry controller for route planning services in the system.

name: AdminRouteController
description: AdminRouteController is a controller class for managing train routes, providing RESTful interfaces for retrieving, adding, and deleting routes, primarily serving the administrator role, and performing permission or session validation through request headers.

name: ExecuteService
description: ExecuteService is an abstract service class responsible for defining interfaces for ticket execution-related operations, including two core methods: ticketExecute and ticketCollect, used to handle order-related ticket execution logic.

name: VerifyCodeServiceImpl
description: VerifyCodeServiceImpl is the implementation class for verification code service, responsible for generating image verification codes and verifying user-submitted verification codes. This class provides functions for obtaining verification code images and verifying the correctness of verification codes, supporting integration in Web requests.

name: AdminTrip
description: AdminTrip is an entity class used to represent train trip information related to administrators, primarily serving as a data model in the system.

name: FoodServiceImpl
description: FoodServiceImpl is the implementation class for food order service, responsible for handling business logic related to food orders, including creating, querying, updating, and deleting food orders, as well as obtaining available food lists based on trip information. This class serves as the core implementation of the food service module in the system, passing context information through HTTP request headers and returning uniformly formatted response results.

name: FoodService
description: FoodService is an abstract service class responsible for managing business logic related to food orders, including creating, batch creating, deleting, querying, updating food orders, and obtaining available food information for specific trips. This class serves as the core interface for food services in the system, for upper layers to call and interact with the data access layer.

name: TripAllDetail
description: TripAllDetail is an entity class used to encapsulate complete trip details related to tickets, serving as a carrier for data transmission and persistence in the system.

name: BasicServiceImpl
description: BasicServiceImpl is a basic service implementation class, primarily responsible for providing query functions related to train trips, routes, stations, and price configurations. It serves as the underlying service support in the system, providing core capabilities for upper-level business such as station existence verification, route information retrieval, train type queries, and price configuration queries, and passes request context information through HttpHeaders.

name: Config
description: The Config class is a general configuration entity class used to encapsulate configuration information in the system, serving as a data carrier in the system, usually corresponding to database tables or other configuration sources.

name: OrderAlterInfo
description: OrderAlterInfo is an entity class used to encapsulate information related to order rebooking, belonging to the data model layer of the train-ticket system, primarily used for transmitting and storing related data in the order rebooking business process.

name: UserOperationException
description: A general exception class representing user operation exceptions, used to encapsulate error information related to user operations.

name: AssuranceRepository
description: AssuranceRepository is a persistence interface for managing assurance data, providing functions to query, delete, and retrieve all assurance records based on ID or order ID, belonging to the data access layer component.

name: ContactsController
description: ContactsController is a controller class for managing user contact information, providing RESTful interfaces for contact CRUD and list retrieval, supporting both regular users and administrators, responsible for handling HTTP requests related to contacts in the system.

name: AssuranceController
description: AssuranceController is a controller class for handling assurance-related business, responsible for providing RESTful interfaces to support CRUD operations on assurance records, including querying, creating, modifying, and deleting assurance information by order ID or assurance ID, and supporting retrieval of all assurance types and assurance lists.

name: RabbitSend
description: The RabbitSend class is responsible for sending messages through RabbitMQ, providing a send method for sending specified string messages to message queues.

name: TripInfo
description: The TripInfo class is used to encapsulate trip information, mainly containing the starting and ending locations of the trip, providing methods to obtain the origin and destination. This class serves as an entity class for trip data in the system, used for data transmission and storage.

name: PreserveOtherController
description: PreserveOtherController is responsible for handling other business requests related to ticket reservation, providing homepage access and ticket reservation interfaces, and is one of the entry controllers for order services.

name: TrainController
description: TrainController is a RESTful controller for managing train information, providing functions to create, query, update, and delete TrainType entities, supporting retrieval of train types by ID or name, and handling related HTTP requests and responses.

name: FoodDeliveryController
description: FoodDeliveryController is a controller class responsible for handling HTTP requests related to food delivery orders, providing RESTful interfaces for creating, deleting, querying, and updating delivery order information (such as trip ID, seat number, delivery time, etc.), serving as the entry point for food delivery services in the system.

name: WebSecurityConfig
description: WebSecurityConfig is a class for configuring Spring Security settings, primarily responsible for authentication management, HTTP security policies, password encoding, and cross-origin (CORS) configuration. It defines security rules by overriding the configure method, and provides Bean configurations for key security components such as AuthenticationManager and PasswordEncoder, playing a core security control role in the system.

name: ConsignPrice
description: ConsignPrice is an entity class used to represent consignment price-related information, belonging to the data model part of the train-ticket system.

name: AccountInfo
description: An entity class representing user account information, used to store and transmit account-related data in the system.

name: TrainFoodService
description: TrainFoodService is an abstract service class responsible for managing train dining-related operations, including creating dining information, listing all dining options, and querying corresponding dining by trip ID. This class defines the core interface for train dining services, for concrete implementation classes to inherit and implement, and supports request context passing through HttpHeaders, serving as a coordinator for train dining business logic in the system.

name: EmailProperties
description: The EmailProperties class is used to encapsulate configuration properties for mail services, including host address, port, username, and password, providing corresponding getter and setter methods to support external access and configuration.

name: RouteInfo
description: RouteInfo is an entity class used to represent route-related information, primarily used for data transmission and persistence in the system.

name: PriceConfigRepository
description: PriceConfigRepository is a data access interface responsible for managing persistent operations on PriceConfig entities. It provides methods to query price configurations based on ID, route ID, train type, and other conditions, supporting single and batch queries, serving as the access entry point for price configuration data in the system, decoupled from the business logic layer.

name: FoodDeliveryServiceImpl
description: FoodDeliveryServiceImpl is an implementation class for food delivery service, responsible for handling business logic related to food delivery orders, including creating, deleting, querying orders, and updating delivery information (such as trip ID, seat number, and delivery time). This class serves as the core component of the food delivery service in the system, providing RESTful API interfaces for external calls.

name: TripAllDetailInfo
description: Represents complete detailed information about a ticket trip, including basic information such as departure and destination.

name: SecurityService
description: SecurityService is an abstract service class responsible for security management-related configuration operations, including querying, adding, modifying, deleting security configurations, and account security checks. This class provides a unified interface for security configuration management, with actual logic to be completed by concrete implementation classes.

name: DeliveryInfo
description: An entity class representing delivery information, used to encapsulate data related to delivery, serving as an object for data transmission and persistence in the system.

name: FoodDeliveryService
description: FoodDeliveryService is an abstract service class responsible for managing the full lifecycle operations of food delivery orders, including creating, deleting, querying (by ID, all, by store ID), and updating order-associated trip ID, seat number, and delivery time. This class serves as the interface definition for food delivery business logic in the system, for concrete implementation classes to inherit and provide actual business processing.

name: PreserveOtherService
description: PreserveOtherService is an abstract service class that defines the core interface preserve for ticket booking, used to handle non-main flow booking requests. This class is located in the order service module, serving as a base class for other concrete booking service implementations, collaborating with OrderTicketsInfo and HttpHeaders to complete request processing.

name: Gender
description: The Gender class is used to represent gender information, providing mapping and query functions between gender codes and names, supporting retrieval of corresponding gender names through codes.

name: AuthConstant
description: AuthConstant is a general utility class for centrally managing authentication-related constants, typically containing static constant values related to authentication and authorization, providing unified constant references for other components in the system.

name: FoodOrder
description: The FoodOrder class is used to represent food order entities in the train ticket system, encapsulating data attributes related to food ordering, serving as a carrier for data transmission and persistence.

name: ContactsInitData
description: ContactsInitData is a startup class for initializing contact data, executing relevant initialization logic when the system starts via the run method.

name: InsidePayment
description: InsidePayment is an entity class used to represent internal payment-related information in the system, and is part of the domain model of the train-ticket system.

name: ContactsServiceImpl
description: ContactsServiceImpl is the implementation class for contact management service, responsible for handling CRUD operations on contacts, including querying contacts by ID or account ID, creating, modifying, deleting contacts, and retrieving all contact information, providing contact data management support for the train ticket booking system.

name: AdminOrderController
description: AdminOrderController is a controller class for managing orders, providing administrators with CRUD operations on orders. It is located in the control layer of the system, responsible for handling HTTP requests related to orders and interacting with the service layer to complete business logic.

name: SeatInfo
description: SeatInfo is an entity class used to represent basic seat information in the train ticket system, serving as a data model in the system for storing and transmitting seat-related data.

name: Response
description: A general response utility class used to encapsulate and process system return results.

name: OrderOtherRepository
description: OrderOtherRepository is an abstract data access interface responsible for providing persistent operations on order data, including querying orders by ID, account ID, travel date, train number, and other conditions, as well as deleting specified orders. This class serves as a general contract for the order data access layer in the system, to be inherited and implemented by concrete implementation classes.

name: AdminTravelService
description: AdminTravelService is an abstract service class responsible for managing CRUD operations (Create, Read, Update, Delete) on travel information, providing administrators with comprehensive control over trip data. This class defines abstract methods for retrieving all trips, adding new trips, updating existing trips, and deleting specified trips, which need to be implemented by concrete implementation classes.

name: AssuranceInitData
description: A startup class responsible for initializing assurance-related data, executing initialization logic when the system starts via the run method.

name: TrainFood
description: The TrainFood class is used to represent food information on trains, encapsulating data related to train catering as an entity class in the system.

name: PaymentRepository
description: PaymentRepository is an abstract data access interface responsible for persistent operations on Payment entities, providing functions to query payment records by ID, order ID, and user ID, as well as querying all payment records. This class is located in the data access layer, providing payment data access support for upper-level business logic.

name: TravelService2
description: TravelService2 is an abstract service class responsible for providing complete business operation interfaces related to trips, including CRUD operations (Create, Read, Update, Delete) on trips, as well as batch queries, trip detail retrieval, route and train type queries, and other functions. This class serves as the core service layer of the trip management module in the system, defining standard interfaces for upper-level calls, with concrete implementations completed by subclasses.

name: InfoConstant
description: InfoConstant is a constant class used to centrally manage constant definitions related to system information, belonging to general utility classes.

name: ConsignController
description: ConsignController is a controller class for handling consignment-related business, responsible for providing CRUD functions for consignment information, including querying consignment records by account ID, order ID, or consignee, as well as inserting and updating consignment information. This class is located in the Web layer of the system, interacting with the front-end or other services through HTTP interfaces.

name: PollThread
description: PollThread is a thread class for polling ticket reservation operations, driving the polling logic through the run() method, and using the doPreserve() method to initiate HTTP requests to a specified URL to complete reservation operations.

name: InsidePaymentInitData
description: InsidePaymentInitData is a startup class for initializing internal payment-related data, executing necessary data initialization logic when the system starts by implementing the run method.

name: MailService
description: A business implementation class responsible for sending emails, sending emails to recipients based on specified templates.

name: OrderInfo
description: The OrderInfo class is used to encapsulate conditions and status information related to order queries, supporting query filtering by travel date, purchase date, and order status, and providing corresponding enable/disable and status retrieval methods.

name: PriceService
description: PriceService is an abstract service class responsible for managing the full lifecycle operations of price configurations (PriceConfig), including creation, querying, updating, and deletion. It serves as the core service interface for price management in the system, providing price query functions based on various conditions such as route ID and train type, and integrates with HTTP request headers (HttpHeaders) to support context passing. This class defines a unified price service contract for concrete implementation classes.

name: ContactsService
description: ContactsService is an abstract service class responsible for managing business logic related to contacts, providing core operations such as creating, deleting, modifying, and querying contacts (including by ID, account ID, and retrieving all contacts). This class is located in the service layer of the system, serving as a unified interface for contact data operations, for upper-level controllers to call, and working in coordination with the data access layer.

name: StationController
description: StationController is a RESTful controller for managing station information, providing CRUD and batch query functions for stations, including querying stations by name or ID, batch querying station IDs or names, and uniformly handling authentication information in request headers.

name: ConsignPriceService
description: ConsignPriceService is an abstract service class responsible for handling business logic related to consignment prices, including obtaining prices based on weight and region, querying price information, creating and modifying price configurations, and retrieving current price configurations. This class provides a unified interface for consignment price management, with actual logic to be completed by concrete implementation classes.

name: AuthUserController
description: AuthUserController is responsible for handling requests related to user authentication, including obtaining tokens, querying all authenticated users, and deleting specified users, serving as the controller for the authentication management module in the system.

name: JWTProvider
description: The JWTProvider class is responsible for generating and managing JWT (JSON Web Token) tokens, primarily used for creating security tokens based on user authentication information, supporting the authentication process in the system.

name: TravelService
description: TravelService is an abstract service class responsible for providing complete CRUD operations and various query functions related to travel (tickets, trips), including single trip management, batch queries, parallel queries, trip detail retrieval, route and train type queries, etc., while also supporting administrator-specific queries. This class serves as the core interface for the travel service module, for concrete implementation classes to inherit and implement their business logic.

name: UserDto
description: UserDto is a Data Transfer Object (DTO) used to encapsulate and transmit user-related information in the system. This class is located in the edu.fudanselab.trainticket.dto package, with its main responsibility being to serve as a carrier for user data, typically used for data exchange between the service layer and the presentation layer.

name: UserController
description: UserController is a controller class for handling user-related HTTP requests, responsible for providing user management functions, including user registration, querying (by username or user ID), updating, and deleting operations. This class is located in the Web layer of the system, interacting with the front-end or other services through RESTful interfaces, and relies on UserDto to transmit user data.

name: OrderSecurity
description: OrderSecurity is an entity class related to order security, used to represent and manage order security information in the train ticket booking system.

name: AdminRouteServiceImpl
description: AdminRouteServiceImpl is a business implementation class for managing train routes, responsible for providing CRUD functions for routes and station verification, primarily serving administrators' operational needs for route information.

name: SeatService
description: SeatService is an abstract service class responsible for handling business logic related to seats, including seat allocation and querying remaining tickets for intervals. This class defines two core abstract methods: distributeSeat for allocating seats, and getLeftTicketOfInterval for obtaining the remaining ticket count for a specified interval. As a service layer component, it provides a unified interface for seat management to upper-level callers, with concrete implementation completed by subclasses.

name: OrderOtherController
