description: OrderOtherController is a controller class for handling train ticket order-related business, responsible for providing RESTful API interfaces for order creation, querying, modification, deletion, payment, price calculation, security information checking, etc., while supporting functions such as obtaining seat lists and saving order information, serving as the entry point for the order management module to interact with external systems.

name: Queues
description: Configuration class used to define and manage message queues (such as mail queues), providing queue declaration and initialization functions in the system.

name: UserRepository
description: UserRepository is a data access interface responsible for persistent operations on user data, providing functions to query users by username or user ID, delete users, and retrieve lists of all users.

name: TravelServiceImpl
description: TravelServiceImpl is the core implementation class for travel services, responsible for handling business logic related to train trips, routes, seats, and prices, including creating, querying, updating, and deleting travel information, and providing various query methods (such as batch queries, parallel queries, etc.). This class obtains route, train type, and remaining ticket information by calling other services, providing complete travel data support for upper-level controllers.

name: OrderOtherService
description: OrderOtherService is an abstract service class responsible for handling various operations related to orders, including order creation, querying, modification, cancellation, payment, and security verification. This class defines the core interface for order management, providing a unified order service abstraction for upper-level business, with actual logic to be completed by concrete implementation classes.

name: PreserveService
description: PreserveService is an abstract service class responsible for handling ticket booking-related business logic, defining the preserve method for executing order ticket reservation operations, with actual logic to be completed by concrete implementation classes.

name: StringUtils
description: StringUtils is a utility class that provides auxiliary functions such as mutual conversion between strings and dates, and string format processing, used to simplify common data type conversion operations.

name: SecurityRepository
description: SecurityRepository is an abstract data access interface for managing SecurityConfig entities, providing query-based on name or ID, full query, and deletion operations, belonging to the data persistence layer of the system security configuration module.

name: WaitListOrderRepository
description: WaitListOrderRepository is a data access interface responsible for persistent operations on WaitListOrder entities, including querying by ID, querying all, querying by account ID, and deletion operations. This class is located in the data access layer of the system, providing storage and retrieval services for waitlist order data to upper-level business logic.

name: AdminTravelController
description: AdminTravelController is a controller class for managing travel information, providing administrators with CRUD operations on travel data. It is located in the control layer of the system, handling HTTP requests related to travel, and relies on HttpHeaders for request header processing, interacting with TravelInfo entities for data exchange.

name: TrainFoodInitData
description: TrainFoodInitData is a utility class for initializing train food data, with its main responsibility being to load and parse food data when the system starts, converting it into a list of Food objects. This class receives initialization parameters through the run method, and uses the toFoodList method to convert string-formatted data into structured food lists, typically as part of the system initialization process.

name: QueryInfo
description: The QueryInfo class is used to encapsulate query condition configurations, supporting enabling or disabling query functions based on travel date, purchase date, and order status, serving as a builder for query parameters to pass and manage query conditions in the system.

name: OrderServiceImpl
description: OrderServiceImpl is the core implementation class for order services, responsible for handling the full lifecycle management of train ticket orders, including creation, querying, modification, cancellation, payment, and other operations. This class serves as the main bearer of order business logic in the system, interacting with data models such as Seat and Order, and HTTP request context, providing complete order service interfaces for upper layers.

name: CommonOrder
description: CommonOrder is a general order entity class used to represent ordinary order information in the train ticket system. This class overrides the equals and hashCode methods to support content-based equality comparison and hash operations, typically used for collection storage, deduplication, or as keys in Maps. In the system, it may serve as a base or general representation for other specific order types.

name: BaseException
description: BaseException is a general exception base class used as the parent class for other specific exception classes in the train ticket system, providing a unified foundation for exception handling.

name: StationFoodController
description: StationFoodController is responsible for handling HTTP requests related to station food services, providing interfaces for obtaining station food stores and their food lists. This class serves as the controller for station food information in the system, interacting with the front-end or other services through RESTful APIs.

name: VerifyResult
description: VerifyResult is a general entity class used to encapsulate the results of verification operations, possibly serving as the return value type for verification logic in the system, and interacting with other business modules for data exchange.

name: Type
description: The Type class is used to represent entities of a certain type, containing two attributes: type name and index, providing static methods to obtain names by index, and supporting read and write operations on names and indexes.

name: ConsignPriceConfigRepository
description: ConsignPriceConfigRepository is a repository interface for managing consignment price configurations, providing methods to query consignment price configurations by index, belonging to the data access layer component.

name: MoneyType
description: The MoneyType class is used to represent and manage monetary types, providing functions to obtain names by index, and to set and get names and indexes, belonging to entity classes.

name: SeatServiceImpl
description: SeatServiceImpl is the core implementation class for seat services, responsible for handling business logic such as seat allocation and querying remaining tickets for intervals. This class completes seat allocation by determining conflicts between sold tickets and target seats, and supports calculating direct ratios based on request header parameters to assist in remaining ticket queries. It is located in the service layer of the system, providing seat-related business support for upper-level controllers.

name: AuthUser
description: The AuthUser class is an entity class used to represent authenticated users, implementing the core methods of Spring Security's UserDetails interface, used to provide information required for user authentication and authorization, such as username, password, permissions, and account status.

name: FoodDeliveryOrder
description: An entity class representing food delivery orders, used to store and manage order information related to food delivery.

name: OrderService
description: OrderService is an abstract service class responsible for handling business logic related to train ticket orders, including operations such as order creation, querying, modification, cancellation, payment, and security management. This class defines multiple abstract methods for concrete implementation classes to complete actual order processing functions, located in the business logic layer of the system, interacting with order data models and external interfaces.

name: SecurityInitData
description: Responsible for initializing data loading for the system security module, typically executing security-related configuration or data initialization when the application starts.

name: TrainFoodController
description: TrainFoodController is responsible for handling HTTP requests related to train dining, providing interfaces for obtaining all train dining information and dining information for specific trips, serving as the front-end controller for train dining services in the system.

name: PaymentType
description: The PaymentType class is used to represent payment method types, encapsulating the name of the payment type and its corresponding index value, providing static and instance methods to obtain names, and supporting setting of names and indexes. This class serves as a basic data entity for payment-related modules in the system, working in coordination with other payment processing classes.

name: DocumentType
description: The DocumentType class is used to represent and manage enumeration information for document types, providing static methods to obtain names by code, as well as instantiated code and name access methods.

name: StationFoodServiceImpl
description: StationFoodServiceImpl is an implementation class that provides station food service management functions, responsible for handling creation, querying, and other operations related to station food stores, including obtaining food store information by station name or ID, and listing food stores for all or specific stations.

name: AuthInitUser
description: AuthInitUser is a startup class used to initialize authentication-related user data, typically executing user initialization logic when the system starts.

name: PaymentController
description: PaymentController is responsible for handling HTTP requests related to payment, including payment, recharge, and querying account information, serving as the entry controller for the payment module.

name: Route
description: The Route class is used to represent train route entities, serving as a carrier for route-related data in the system, possibly containing information such as origin, destination, and intermediate stops.

name: GetAccountByIdResult
description: An entity class representing the result of the operation to obtain account information by ID, used to encapsulate account data returned from queries.

name: AdminBasicInfoController
description: AdminBasicInfoController is a controller class for managing basic data of the railway booking system, providing CRUD operations on core information such as contacts, stations, train types, system configurations, and prices. This class is located in the control layer of the system, responsible for receiving administrator requests and calling corresponding services to complete basic data maintenance, serving as a key entry point for backend management functions.

name: Delivery
description: The Delivery class is an entity class used to represent delivery-related information, belonging to the data model layer of the train-ticket system, primarily used to encapsulate delivery-related data fields, supporting persistence and business logic processing.

name: SwaggerConfig
description: SwaggerConfig is a class used to configure Swagger API document generation, defining RESTful API documentation rules through the createRestApi() method, and providing API metadata through the apiInfo() method. This class is responsible for integrating and customizing Swagger in the system to support API visualization and testing.

name: SeatClass
description: SeatClass is an entity class representing seat categories, used to encapsulate seat type codes and names, and provides static methods to obtain corresponding names by code. This class is mainly used in the system for ticket-related seat type management.

name: TransferTravelResult
description: An entity class representing transfer trip query results, used to encapsulate train travel information involving transfers.

name: RoutePlanResultUnit
description: Represents a single result unit in route planning results, used to encapsulate detailed information for a certain segment of trip planning.

name: StationRepository
description: StationRepository is an abstract repository class for managing station data access, providing interface methods for querying station information by name, ID, or in full, for upper-level services to call to achieve retrieval of station data.

name: AuthUserServiceImpl
description: AuthUserServiceImpl is the core service implementation class for authentication user management, responsible for handling operations such as adding, deleting, and querying user data, as well as creating default users, and includes validation logic for user creation information, undertaking basic service responsibilities related to user authentication and authorization in the system.

name: TokenException
description: TokenException is a class used to handle exceptions related to tokens, belonging to the exception handling module of the train-ticket system, used to encapsulate and throw errors related to authentication or authorization tokens.

name: AuthUserDetailsServiceImpl
description: AuthUserDetailsServiceImpl is the implementation class in Spring Security used to load user details, responsible for querying and returning user authentication information based on usernames to support the system's authentication process.
